title: Integrating the Silva pattern into clinical practice: a prognostic tool for tailoring surgery and adjuvant therapy in cervical adenocarcinoma.
snippet: To establish an intelligent risk-stratification framework by validating the Silva pattern system in endocervical adenocarcinoma (ECA), enabling personalized treatment decisions. Clinicopathological data from 178 ECA patients (2017-2023) were retrospectively analyzed. Silva patterns were assessed by two gynecologic pathologists using the Silva pattern system...
